home.welcomeCreative: Welcome back, {{name}}. What do you want to create or move today?

home.descImpact: Use changethegame to advance your projects, connect allies, and take action for your territory and community.
home.descCreative: Use changethegame to express, explore, and co-create with other artists and dreamers.
home.descHybrid: Use changethegame to mix art, impact, ideas and people into something new.
home.descOrgRep: Use changethegame to find talent, build partnerships, promote your services, and connect with the ecosystem.
home.descDefault: Use changethegame to discover quests, connect with people, and build something meaningful.
home.noActiveTasks: No active tasks. Add one above or create a quest!
home.whatToday: What would you like to {{verb}} today?
home.enrichedTerritory: Your contribution has enriched the territory.
home.questDraftGenerated: Quest draft generated from your vision:

settings.title: My Hub
settings.languageDescription: Choose the language for the interface. User-generated content will be shown in your preferred language when a translation is available.

wallet.title: Wallet
wallet.creditsExplanation: Credits are used to launch quests, events, and certain services. You earn Credits by completing quests and via subscription plans or top-ups.
wallet.xpExplanation: XP measures your long-term contributions and reputation. XP is assigned by the platform and cannot be edited directly.

network.title: My Network
network.subtitle: Your ecosystem at a glance — people, organizations, and territories connected to you.
network.joinGuildsToConnect: Join guilds, organizations or quests to build your network.
network.noOrgLinked: No traditional organizations linked to your account.
network.addTerritories: Add territories and topics in your profile settings.

landing.heroSubtitle: Discover quests, join guilds, and share your expertise in a regenerative ecosystem built for changemakers.
landing.step1Desc: Choose your topics (Houses) and territories to shape your experience.
landing.step2Desc: Find meaningful missions and form pods to collaborate on impact projects.
landing.step3Desc: Join guilds, follow companies, and grow your regenerative network.
landing.step4Desc: List services, get booked, and earn XP for your contributions.
landing.whoSubtitle: Whether you're a practitioner, a network facilitator, or a company with impact ambitions — there's a place for you.
landing.gc1: Find meaningful missions aligned with your values
landing.gc2: Share knowledge and build your reputation
landing.gc3: Earn XP and track your contribution index
landing.eb2: Host pods for peer learning groups
landing.ci1: Post impact quests to find collaborators
landing.postQuestAsCompany: Post a quest as a company
landing.openMissions: Open missions waiting for your contribution.
landing.browseThematic: Browse thematic communities shaping the future.
landing.trustSubtitle: Your contributions build a visible reputation — no résumé needed.
landing.xpContributionDesc: Earn experience points for every quest you complete and service you deliver.
landing.achievementsDesc: Unlock badges for milestones — your track record speaks for itself.
landing.podsDesc: Small learning & action groups that keep you accountable and connected.
landing.joinNetwork: Join a growing network of changemakers across territories.
